text: They step into the mist as one steps into a memory.
The shrouded pass does not simply begin. It consumes.
The world vanishes behind a wall of grey.
Only the sound of Skyrith's ragged breath and the crunch of kale's boots on frozen stone mark their progress.
The storm is not a head. It is all around. It is the path itself.
To turn back is to succumb. To go forward is to trust a whisper.
